zh.Semur-en-Brionnais, Charolles, Saône-et-: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈洛勒斯哈洛勒斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais於大約1203年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易謝姆--布利奧乃斯時，他的父親Dalmas de Semur-en-Brionnais III42歲，母親Beatrice de Vignory34歲。他於1244年與Isabelle de Beaujeu結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1247年8月在法國布格薩o-吉洛易謝姆--布利奧乃斯享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais于大约1203年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易謝姆--布利奧乃斯时，他的父亲Dalmas de Semur-en-Brionnais III42岁，母亲Beatrice de Vignory34岁。他于1244年与Isabelle de Beaujeu结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1247年8月在法国布格薩o-吉洛易謝姆--布利奧乃斯享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais was born about 1203, in Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Dalmas de Semur-en-Brionnais III, was 42 and his mother, Beatrice de Vignory, was 34. He married Isabelle de Beaujeu in 1244. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in August 1247, in Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Burgundy, France, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais est né environ 1203, à Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Dalmas de Semur-en-Brionnais III, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Vignory, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Beaujeu en 1244. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en août 1247, à Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais um 1203 in Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dalmas de Semur-en-Brionnais III 42 und seine Mutter Beatrice de Vignory 34. Er hat 1244 Isabelle de Beaujeu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im August 1247 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais è nato il circa 1203 nel Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Dalmas de Semur-en-Brionnais III, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice de Vignory, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle de Beaujeu nel 1244. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel agosto 1247, nel Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 45 anni.

フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーセムル-エン-ブリオナイス
ja.Semur-en-Brionnais, Charolles, Saône-et-: フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーチャーオレスチャーオレス
ja.lifeSummary: Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnaisが約1203年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーセムル-エン-ブリオナイスで生まれた時，父Dalmas de Semur-en-Brionnais IIIは42歳，母Beatrice de Vignoryは34歳であった。1244年にIsabelle de Beaujeuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1247年8月にフランスボウルゴグンサoネ-エト-ロイアーセムル-エン-ブリオナイスで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais(이)가 대략 1203년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 젬--브리오나이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dalmas de Semur-en-Brionnais III(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Vignory(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1244년 Isabelle de Beaujeu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1247년 8월 프랑스 부르고그니 사o니-트-로이르 젬--브리오나이에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais nasceu aproximadamente 1203, em Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Dalmas de Semur-en-Brionnais III, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Vignory, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Beaujeu em 1244. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1247, em Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, França, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais родился около 1203 г. в местности семур-ен-брионнеи, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Dalmas de Semur-en-Brionnais III было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Vignory, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Beaujeu в 1244 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер август 1247 г. в местности семур-ен-брионнеи, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 45 лет.

sm.BET 1215 AND 1224: mai le 1215 e o'o I le 1224

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon II de Semur-en-Brionnais nació aproximadamente 1203, en Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Dalmas de Semur-en-Brionnais III, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Beatrice de Vignory, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Isabelle de Beaujeu en 1244. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en agosto de 1247, en Semur-en-Brionnais, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 45 años.
